title: Zero In Fruit Fly Trap - Ready-Baited Indoor Fly Catcher, Apple-Shaped Twin Pack - Non-Toxic, Insect Trap to Attract & Trap Bugs - Suitable for Kitchen & Home Use, Lasts up to 30 Days
features: INDOOR FRUIT FLY TRAP – Keep your kitchen fly-free with the Zero In Ready-Baited Fruit Fly Traps. The traps contain a specially formulated lure that attracts and traps fruit flies quickly and efficiently. The decorative apple-shaped design is discreet and stylish to blend in seamlessly with your home

NON-TOXIC PROTECTION – Experience peace of mind with our non-hazardous indoor fly killer. The spill-proof shell makes it perfect for use around food, fruits, veggies and open wine bottles. Safe for your family and pets, it ensures a chemical-free environment while getting rid of pesky fruit flies

TWIN PACK VALUE – Double your protection with our two pre-baited fruit fly catchers, each providing up to 30 days of constant coverage. Enjoy exceptional value and long-term continuous relief from fruit flies. Keep your home and kitchen fly-free all summer long

EASY TO USE – Remove the foil tab and pour the fruit fly killer solution into the trap to dissolve the granules. Place it where needed. For larger spaces or severe infestations, use multiple traps. Refills (ZER702) are available for convenience (not included)

CARING FOR PEOPLE & THE PLANET – Zero In protects your health and home against Home Pest problems with minimal environmental impact. Zero In products are ethical and welfare-friendly solutions to everyday Home Pest problems that safeguard your well-being. We care for you, your family, and the planet
description: The Fruit Fly Trap from Zero In kills fruit flies and bugs without using hazardous chemicals The product is hygienic and can be safely used near fruit, vegetables, and open wine bottles to provide up to 30 days of continuous and discrete control Fruit flies are drawn down into the non-toxic trap solution, where there is no escape Just pour the solution provided into the trap and place in the worst affected area For severe infestations, or protection of a large area, use more than one trap DIRECTIONS FOR USE: Peel foil tab off from the Fruit Fly Trap Open the trap solution and pour the liquid into the trap to dissolve the granules already inside the trap A slight tapping of the trap on the work surface will help prevent liquid build up or air bubbles in the neck of the trap Place the trap(s) in areas where fruit flies have been seen, such as kitchen areas, near fruit or open wine bottles
